title: Nel, Freelance website creator

hero.heading:
Hi, I'm Nel
Freelance website creator

projects.title: MiChat
projects.desc: A real-time chat app that allows to chat with other people, send images, create group chats, and more...

projects.title: Twitter Clone
projects.desc: A clone of the famous Twitter social media. Includes all main app features like authentication, user profiles, following, liking and retweeting tweets, and more...

projects.title: Weather App
projects.desc: A weather app that fetch data from the OpenWeather API and display it in a nicely way.

about: I like to create stunning and highly interactive websites that are optimized for search engine and that help you get real conversions. I handle everything, from design to code to production, which allows me to be blazingly fast in the process. I am passionate about creating memorable experiences through great design. Beside coding, I enjoy spending time in nature and with friends.
